controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.confidence_rationale: Fixture password helper is treated as a narrow code-level quick check with direct source evidence.
controls.evidence_quality_rationale: Evidence is strong for the scoped password-hashing check because no manual evidence is required for that narrow claim.

findings.title: Password hashing anchor
findings.description: Fixture password helper is used as a stable source anchor.

evidence.assessment: The fixture file provides the quick-check source anchor.
